description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-menu

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/`
**Sub-components:** hx-menu-item, hx-menu-divider

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Item padding, hover, active, divider. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. menu/menuitem roles. Keyboard (arrow keys, Home, End, typeahead). Disabled items. Checked items.
3. **Functionality** — Menu items (normal, checkbox, radio). Dividers. Submenus. Keyboard navigation. Typeahead search. Disabled items.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Hover/focus states. Divider styling.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All three sub-components documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Navigation. Selection. Typeahead. Submenus.
8. **Storybook** — Basic. Checkable. Radio group. Submenus. Dividers.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Admin menu. Context menu. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-menu
